name: Shrimp Sauce with Linguine
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Rock shrimp or small prawns, shelled
2 cups fresh spinach leaves, cut into chiffonade
2 Roma tomatoes, cut into 1/4 inch pieces
Freshly grated Parmesan Cheese for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor with the steel blade attachment, puree together the olive oil, lemon juice, rosemary, oregano, paprika, salt, cayenne pepper, and minced garlic until finely minced.
2. Melt butter in a large sauté pan over medium heat. Add the pureed mixture and bay leaves. Sauté for a few minutes, ensuring the garlic does not burn.
3. Add shrimp to the pan and coat each shrimp with the hot sauce. Cook quickly until barely cooked through (1-2 minutes). Remove the pan from the heat.
4. Cook linguine according to package instructions and drain well. Return the sauté pan to low heat, add the linguine, and toss with the shrimp sauce, spinach, and tomatoes.
5. Serve immediately, garnished with freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
